page: Microsoft Azure D2s_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dsv7 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 2 vCPUs mapped to 1 physical Intel Xeon 6973P-C core with 2 threads per core, operating at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz. The x86_64 architecture includes 8.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include bundled local storage or GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable.

Performance benchmarks reveal a contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core stress-ng CPU performance is average, while multi-core performance falls into the bottom 25%. Single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression show strong and top-tier results respectively, aided by the high 4.2 GHz clock speed and advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and AMX. However, memory bandwidth is weak, particularly for large block writes which register in the bottom 10%. Passmark CPU, database operations, and Redis SET benchmarks also rank in the bottom 25%.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the D2s_v7 offers a balanced resource profile for entry-level workloads that benefit from high single-core clock speeds but do not require massive parallel processing or high memory throughput. The absence of bundled local storage means storage costs are externalized to attached Premium Storage. This server is suited for lightweight web serving, basic database operations, single-threaded file compression tasks, and general-purpose utility workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine in the Dsv7 family, powered by a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor with 2 vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM. Running on Microsoft Hyper-V, this x86_64 instance features no bundled local storage or GPUs but supports Premium Storage. Benchmarks indicate strong single-threaded performance, with top-tier bzip3 decompression and strong gzip compression, though multi-core CPU performance and memory write bandwidth are weak. The server is qualitatively cost-effective for entry-level workloads requiring high single-core clock speeds without heavy multi-threaded demands. It is best suited for lightweight web serving, single-threaded utility tasks, and basic database operations.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v7 is a general-purpose VM featuring 2 vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon processor. It delivers strong single-threaded performance but has limited multi-core and memory bandwidth.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v7 is a general-purpose VM with 2 vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon CPU, suited for light single-threaded workloads.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring high single-core clock speeds and advanced Intel instruction sets for entry-level workloads.
bullet_points: Features 2 vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM powered by a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor.
Delivers strong single-threaded performance in gzip compression and bzip3 decompression benchmarks.
Lacks bundled local storage and GPUs, utilizing external Premium Storage options.
Exhibits weak multi-core performance and low memory write bandwidth.
Appropriate for lightweight web serving, single-threaded utility tasks, and basic database operations.
